title: Minecraft: Origins
description:
This modpack has a whole list of cool and interesting mods.
So please... give it a try!!
(you can always uninstall)
body:
This modpack gives a sense of realism to the player, with a first person modle and animations adding immersion!
Feel free to play this with friends, with the essentials mod!
- **-----other key mods-----**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Better End
- Better Nether
- When Dungeons Arise
- MC Dungeons Weapons
- MC Dungeons Armor
- Trinkets
- Artifacts
- Things
- Regions Unexplored
- Antique Atlas 4
- Spellbound Weapons
- Immersive Armors
- Grappling Hook Mod: Restitched
- Automobility
- immersive aircrafts
- advance netherite + enderite
- Ad Astra
- origins 
- essentials
- first person camera
- Iron Chest

#   **AND MUCH MUCH MORE**
</details>
